summary: Tested CAD precision enhancements for Composer canvas. Grid snapping, Rectangle Room drawing, and closed loop detection are working. Endpoint/Midpoint snap indicators and Shift-lock orthogonal constraint text were not visible in UI testing but code implementation is present.

integration_issues.issue: Green crosshair indicator for endpoint snapping (within 80mm) was not visible during testing. The code is implemented at lines 3499-3534 but may require cursor to be very precisely positioned.
Orange diamond indicator for midpoint snapping (within 60mm) was not visible during testing. Code is implemented at lines 3537-3548.

The 'ORTHOGONAL LOCK (Shift)' text indicator (lines 3564-3575) was not visible when holding Shift during wall drawing. The shiftKeyHeld state tracking is implemented but the visual indicator may not be rendering.

passed_tests: Grid Snapping - Gray indicator with 'GRID' label appears when cursor snaps to 50mm grid
Rectangle Room Drawing - Creates 4 walls forming a closed loop with proper dimensions
Wall Drawing with Dimensions - Shows real-time dimension labels (e.g., 'Horizontal 1118mm')
Draw Mode Panel - Shows Rectangle Room, Square Room, and Free Line Draw options
Floor Material Selection - Multiple floor materials available (Tiles, Wood, Marble, Granite, Concrete)
Closed Loop Detection - Console shows '[UnifiedBoundary] Found 1 closed loop(s) from 6 walls'
Wall Tool Activation - Wall tool button in toolbar works correctly
Free Line Draw Mode - Click-to-place wall drawing mode works
Canvas Navigation - Pan and zoom functionality works
failed_tests: Endpoint Snap Indicator visibility - Green crosshair not visible in screenshots
Midpoint Snap Indicator visibility - Orange diamond not visible in screenshots
Shift-Lock Orthogonal Text visibility - 'ORTHOGONAL LOCK (Shift)' text not visible when Shift held
action_items: Verify endpoint snap indicator (green crosshair) appears when cursor is within 80mm of wall endpoints - may need to adjust ENDPOINT_SNAP_THRESHOLD or test with more precise cursor positioning
Verify midpoint snap indicator (orange diamond) appears when cursor is within 60mm of wall midpoints
Verify Shift-lock orthogonal constraint text appears when Shift is held during drawing/dragging - check if shiftKeyHeld state is being set correctly
Consider increasing snap thresholds for better user experience (current: endpoint 80mm, midpoint 60mm, grid 50mm)
critical_code_review_comments: findSnapPoint function (lines 1191-1256): Priority-based snapping implemented correctly - Endpoint > Midpoint > Grid > Free
findAlignmentGuides function (lines 1265-1297): Alignment guide detection implemented but guides may not be rendering visibly
applyOrthogonalConstraint function (lines 1300-1315): Orthogonal constraint logic is correct
findMergeTarget function (lines 1318-1335): Vertex merge detection implemented with 100mm threshold
snapToStraightLine function (lines 1337-1371): Enhanced with Shift key support for strict orthogonal constraint
SVG Snap Indicator rendering (lines 3478-3561): Visual indicators implemented with correct colors (green for endpoint, orange for midpoint, gray for grid)
Shift-lock indicator (lines 3564-3575): Text indicator implemented but condition may not be triggering

success_rate.frontend: 75% - Core CAD features working, visual indicators need verification

seed_data_creation: Created a new rectangle room during testing which added 4 walls to the existing layout
context_for_next_testing_agent: CAD precision features are implemented. Grid snapping works and shows 'GRID' label. Rectangle room drawing creates closed loops. The endpoint/midpoint snap indicators (green crosshair/orange diamond) and Shift-lock text may need more precise cursor positioning to trigger. Console logging shows '[UnifiedBoundary] Found X closed loop(s)' when walls form closed shapes. Test by: 1) Login with founder credentials, 2) Navigate to /projects/proj_4aaba062/spatial-boq, 3) Click Wall tool, 4) Select Free Line Draw, 5) Move cursor near existing wall endpoints to test snap indicators.

grid_snapping.evidence: Screenshot shows 'GRID' label with gray indicator circle

rectangle_room_drawing.evidence: Console log: '[UnifiedBoundary] Found 1 closed loop(s) from 6 walls'

wall_dimension_labels.evidence: Screenshot shows 'Horizontal 1118mm' and 'Click to place' labels

alignment_guides.expected: Blue dashed lines when aligning with other wall endpoints

shift_orthogonal_lock.expected: 'ORTHOGONAL LOCK (Shift)' text when Shift held during drawing

vertex_auto_merge.expected: Auto-merge when endpoint dragged within 100mm of another endpoint
